name: Lord Resources Limited
description: Lord Resources Limited is an Australia-based mineral exploration company focused on identifying and developing high-potential projects within Western Australia’s metal heartland. The company maintains a diverse portfolio of exploration assets, including the Ilgarari Copper Project, the Horse Rocks Lithium Project, and several other prospects prospective for gold and base metals. By leveraging advanced exploration techniques and targeting underexplored geological regions, Lord Resources aims to capitalize on the growing demand for green metals, providing investors with exposure to significant discovery opportunities across the lithium, nickel, and gold sectors in a stable mining jurisdiction.
